entries.text: Gym training calendar events were supposed to be recurring Mon/Wed 10-11am but were not on KS's calendar — recreated manually for next several weeks
KS wants recurring gym training blocks on Mondays and Wednesdays 10:00-11:00am — set up for next 4 weeks

Janet created duplicate/triplicate gym calendar events by processing KS's request multiple times across messages. Added deleteEvent and listEvents functions to calendar.js to enable cleanup and future event management
KS taking second Mounjaro dose today (Feb 25), slightly off weekly schedule from Feb 17 start. Experiencing dry mouth as side effect in week 2

YouTube video "I Turned Claude Code Into a Better OpenClaw" — uses Anthropic Agent SDK to bridge local Claude Code to Telegram. Architecture very similar to Janet's Discord setup. Worth reviewing Agent SDK as potential upgrade from direct CLI subprocess spawning.
Installed yt-dlp via Homebrew for direct YouTube transcript extraction — can now pull subtitles from any YouTube link KS sends without needing NotebookLM as middleman

Downloads folder (/Users/janet.bot/Downloads) not accessible from Claude Code due to permission restrictions — causes timeouts when trying to read files there. Need workaround: either grant permission or have KS copy files to ~/discord-bot/ first
KS downloaded the ClaudeClaw "mega prompt" MD file to Downloads — still needs to be read and evaluated for useful patterns. Blocked by Downloads folder permission issue
Google Drive OAuth re-authorization still pending — KS said she'll do it later. Auth script already updated with drive.readonly scope. After re-auth: build drive.js module and wire into bot.js

Agent SDK (@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk) with bypassPermissions as potential replacement for claude-runner.js CLI subprocess spawning — could fix timeout issues caused by permission prompts. From ClaudeClaw rebuild prompt review.
KS wants to investigate Agent SDK + SQLite session resumption as upgrade path for claude-runner.js — approved feasibility research, no implementation yet
KS prefers git-based rollback over parallel modules — commit current state, then modify claude-runner.js directly for Agent SDK upgrade. Revert via git checkout if needed.
